name: Suncorp Stadium
access_notes: Use surrounding streets rather than the immediate gate crowd where possible.
public_transport_notes: Milton station and nearby bus stops support event movement.
parking_notes: Event parking and road controls vary by event.

name: Queensland Tennis Centre
access_notes: Primary venue access is via King Arthur Terrace, Softstone Street, or Fairfield Road. Avoid relying on internal car parks during major events.
public_transport_notes: Yeronga station is about 1 km away according to the venue website; venue FAQ also notes Yeerongpilly station is about 800 m away.
parking_notes: On-site parking is normally available but may be unavailable during major tournaments, so pickup guidance should prefer public street pickup zones.
